  "findings": [
    "Breaker and conductor ampacity mismatch detected during inspection",
    "Conductor is inadequately protected by the overcurrent protective device, violating NEC 240.4",
    "Potential violation of NEC 110.14(C) temperature termination limits"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the overcurrent protective device with one of a lower rating matching the conductor ampacity, or replace the conductor with one of a larger size to match the breaker rating",
    "Verify termination temperature ratings under NEC 110.14(C) for the selected conductor and breaker combination"
  ],
  "rationale": "The field condition reveals a breaker/conductor ampacity mismatch where the overcurrent device does not properly protect the conductor. Under NEC 240.4, conductors must be protected against overcurrent in accordance with their ampacities, making this an immediate code violation and a fire hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 240.4",
    "NEC 110.14(C)"
  ]
}
